evidences.content: Lecce will be looking to bounce back from a 2-0 loss to Lazio, but their difficulties on home soil, a 2-1 away win seems appealing. Unlike previous years, the Giallorossi have been struggling at their Stadio Via del Mare this term, with the team collecting only 0.5 points per game on home soil. Even though there are no fresh injury worries in Eusebio Fi Francesco’s team, we are not tempted to bet on the out-of-sorts hosts. [...] Il Toro, on the other hand, were producing fine performances in the Serie A before a heavy 5-1 loss to Como. You should bear in mind that Torino have been scoring 1.00 goals per game in the last 10 away fixtures in the Italian top flight. As both Jean and Pierret are facing race against the clock to be fit for Sunday’s matinee, the odds for away win have been dropping. Torino are more of a team than Lecce. Given the Giallorossi’ poor form at home, Away Win betting option seems tempting, alongside Over 2.5 goals (57% H2H) and Over 1.5 goals (71% H2H). evidences.content: ## Correct score prediction: Lecce 0-1 Torino With the form both teams not looking impressive, we anticipate a tight and cagey affair in Puglia, but we expect the away side to edge this encounter. Lecce have struggled for goals this season, having failed to score in three of their last five games. On the other hand, Torino have also been inconsistent in front of goal, but they have managed to find the net in four of their last five matches. evidences.content: Alberto Paleari will be looking after the goal for Torino. In his career, Paleari has conceded 14 goals and has accounted for 25 stops in 8 starts. He has conceded 1.69 goals per 90 while holding a mark of 2-3-3. He has earned a save percentage of 64.1% and his clean sheet rate is currently at 36.1%%. Paleari has recorded 3 shutouts and has seen 39 shots tried against him in 746 minutes in his career. Tete Morente is a member of the squad who can make a difference on the pitch for Lecce. The forward from Spain has totaled 27 goals in 17,939 professional minutes. Morente has been given a starting assignment in 203 games thus far in his career and scores 0.14 goals per 90 mins. He has totaled 19 assists while earning 73 points in his career. [...] Torino has a guy in Duvan Zapata, who is a thorn in the side of defenses. He has accounted for 328 pts in his pro soccer career and has assisted on a goal 54 times. The forward from Colombia has accumulated 24,651 professional minutes while scoring 137 goals. evidences.title: Lecce 2-1 Torino: Post-match review, Stats, Key moments - Bwin
evidences.content: bwin bwin # Lecce 2-1 Torino: Post-match review, Stats, Key moments Dive into Bwin’s post-match review of Lecce 2-1 Torino in the Serie A on Sunday, 30 November 2025, with stats, key moments and our take on the match. Lecce vs Torino ## Lecce 2-1 Torino Post-Match Review Lecce took control early in the match, striking twice in quick succession to build a commanding lead. L. Coulibaly opened the scoring in the 20th minute with an assist from M. Berisha, followed just two minutes later by L. Banda’s goal, also set up by Berisha, putting the hosts 2-0 up. Torino struggled to respond before the break, with a substitution in the 37th minute seeing G. Gineitis make way for D. Zapata, but Lecce maintained their advantage into half-time. [...] ### Torino Torino lined up in a 3-5-2 shape, relying on wing-back width and midfield energy to build play, with Vlasic’s creativity standing out in setting up Adams’ goal. The defensive trio provided a base, but partnerships in attack took time to gel following early substitutions. ## Bwin’s Man of the Match M. Berisha earned Man of the Match honours for his pivotal role in Lecce’s victory, providing assists for both first-half goals and dictating...

evidences.content: Football Italia # Serie A Torino vs. Lecce – official line-ups, live updates Avatar #### ByLorenzo Bettoni TURIN, ITALY - JANUARY 18: Che Adams of Torino FC in action against Wesley Franca of AS Roma during the Serie A match between Torino FC and AS Roma at Stadio Olimpico di Torino on January 18, 2026 in Turin, Italy. (Photo by Valerio Pennicino/Getty Images) Torino look to Duvan Zapata and Ché Adams in a crucial home match against Lecce. It kicks off at 12:30 CET (11:30 GMT) at the Stadio Grande Torino. Both sides are far from being in their best form as Torino lost the last four games in a row, while Lecce secured a draw in their last match after four consecutive defeats. [...] Lecce have travelled to Piedmont without Berisha, Camarda, Gorter, Helgason, Marchwinski, Kouassi and Fruchtl. LECCE, ITALY - DECEMBER 12: Nikola Stulic of US Lecce celebrates after scoring his team's opening goal during the Serie A match between US Lecce and Pisa SC at Stadio Via del Mare on December 12, 2025 in Lecce, Italy.
